'''Facet Anamor''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and the daughter of [[Druth Anamor]].

Facet was Executive Personnel Officer at the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] Research Station on the planet [[Toprawa/Legends|Toprawa]] and an associate of [[Havet Storm]]. Storm used this relationship with Facet to gain access to the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] [[Superlaser/Legends|Superlaser]] schematics her father had been working on. Storm then passed these plans onto the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]]. For this betrayal, Facet sought revenge.

Disguised as an assassin named [[Facet Anamor|Diamond]], Facet attacked Havet and some [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] forces on [[Toprawa/Legends|Toprawa]] with a unit of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]]. She killed the Rebel leader [[Vermilion (Rebel Alliance)|Vermilion]], but was wounded by Havet.

Despite her wounds, Facet managed to escape from the Imperial base before the Rebels demolished it to cover their tracks.
